description.p: An Artillerist specializes in using magic to hurl energy, projectiles, and explosions on a battlefield. This destructive power was valued by the armies of the Last War. In peacetime, some Artillerists turn that same craft toward defending settlements and ending conflict before it spreads.
You gain proficiency with Woodcarver's Tools. If you already have this proficiency, you gain proficiency with one other type of Artisan's Tools of your choice.
When you craft a magic Wand, the amount of time required to craft it is halved.
When you reach an Artificer level specified in the Artillerist Spells table, you thereafter always have the listed spells prepared.

Using Woodcarver's Tools or Smith's Tools, you can take a Magic action to create a Small or Tiny Eldritch Cannon in an unoccupied space on a horizontal surface within 5 feet of you. A Small cannon occupies its space, and a Tiny one can be held in one hand.

Once you create a cannon, you can't do so again until you finish a Long Rest or until you expend a spell slot to create one. You can have only one cannon at a time, and you can't create one while your cannon is present.

The cannon is a magical object. It has AC 18 and hit points equal to five times your Artificer level. It is immune to poison damage and psychic damage. If it must make an ability check or saving throw, treat all its ability scores as 10 (+0). If the mending spell is cast on it, it regains 2d6 hit points. It disappears if reduced to 0 hit points or after 1 hour. You can dismiss it early as a Magic action.

When you create the cannon, choose its appearance, whether it has legs, and which kind it is: Flamethrower, Force Ballista, or Protector. On each of your turns, you can take a Bonus Action to activate the cannon if you are within 60 feet of it. As part of that Bonus Action, you can direct it to walk or climb up to 15 feet, provided it has legs.

sheet.description: Create one Eldritch Cannon within 5 feet. AC 18; HP {{eldritch cannon:hp}}; immune to poison and psychic damage; abilities 10 (+0); mending restores 2d6 HP; lasts 1 hour. Once created, you can create another expending a spell slot. Bonus Action to activate the effect of your choice and move it up to 15 feet if it has legs.

Create up to two Eldritch Cannons within 5 feet. AC 18; HP {{eldritch cannon:hp}} each; immune to poison and psychic damage; abilities 10 (+0); mending restores 2d6 HP; lasts 1 hour. Once created, you can't create another until a Long Rest unless you expend a spell slot. Bonus Action to activate the effect of your choice on one or both and move each up to 15 feet if they have legs.

description.p: The cannon exhales fire in an adjacent 15-foot cone that you designate. Each creature in that area must make a Dexterity saving throw against your spell save DC, taking the listed Fire damage on a failed save or half as much damage on a successful one. The fire ignites flammable objects in the area that aren't being worn or carried.

sheet.description: The cannon exhales fire in an adjacent 15-foot cone. Each creature there makes a Dexterity save against DC {{artificer:spellcasting:dc}}, taking {{flamethrower cannon:dice:amount}}d8 Fire damage on a failed save, or half as much on a success.

description.p: Make a ranged spell attack, originating from the cannon, at one creature or object within 120 feet of it. On a hit, the target takes the listed Force damage, and if the target is a creature, it is pushed up to 5 feet away from the cannon.

sheet.description: Make a ranged spell attack from the cannon against one creature or object within 120 feet. On a hit, the target takes {{force ballista cannon:dice:amount}}d8 Force damage, and a creature target is pushed up to 5 feet away.

description.p: The cannon emits a burst of positive energy that grants itself and each creature of your choice within 10 feet of it temporary hit points equal to 1d8 + your Intelligence modifier (minimum of +1).

sheet.description: The cannon grants itself and each creature of your choice within 10 feet {{protector cannon:dice:amount}}d8+{{protector cannon:temporary hp}} temporary hit points.

description.p: When you finish a Long Rest, you can use Woodcarver's Tools to carve special sigils into a wand, staff, or rod and turn it into your Arcane Firearm. The sigils disappear if you later carve them onto a different item; otherwise, they last indefinitely.
You can use the Arcane Firearm as a Spellcasting Focus for your Artificer spells. When you cast an Artificer spell through it, roll 1d8 and add the number rolled to one of the spell's damage rolls.

sheet.description: At the end of a Long Rest, you can turn a wand, staff, or rod into an Arcane Firearm. It can serve as a spellcasting focus for your Artificer spells. When you cast an Artificer spell through it, add 1d8 to one of the spell's damage rolls.

description.p: Your Eldritch Cannons become more destructive.
Enhanced Damage. The damage rolls of Flamethrower and Force Ballista each increase by 1d8.

Detonation. As a Magic action, you can command a cannon within 60 feet of you to detonate. The cannon is destroyed, and each creature within 20 feet of it must make a Dexterity saving throw against your spell save DC, taking 3d8 Force damage on a failed save or half as much damage on a successful one.

sheet.description: Command one Eldritch Cannon within 60 feet to detonate. It is destroyed, and each creature within 20 feet makes a Dexterity save against DC {{artificer:spellcasting:dc}}, taking 3d8 Force damage on a failed save, or half as much on a success.

description.p: You and your allies have Half Cover while within 10 feet of an Eldritch Cannon you create.

You can now have two cannons at the same time. You can create two with the same action, though not with the same spell slot, and you can activate both with the same Bonus Action. You determine whether the cannons are identical or different. You can't create a third cannon while you have two.

sheet.description: You and your allies have Half Cover while within 10 feet of your Eldritch Cannons. You can have up to two cannons at the same time, create both with the same action, and activate both with the same Bonus Action. You can crate two cannon expending 2 spell slots.
